title: aneurolepidium fasciculatum
intro: Aneurolepidium fasciculatum, also known as Duhga in Hindi, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is a medicinal plant with properties that aid in reducing inflammation and has been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Aneurolepidium fasciculatum can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
